Executive Member · URE RACE-CREW TEAM

MD. SADMAN
MAHIN

I am an experienced Crowd Control and Road Management Leader with strong skills in team coordination, public safety, and traffic management. I specialize in maintaining order during events, managing large crowds, and ensuring smooth road operations in busy environments. I have the ability to stay calm under pressure, make quick decisions, and communicate effectively with both teams and the public. My leadership style focuses on discipline, responsibility, and teamwork to ensure safety and efficiency at all times. I am dedicated to creating secure and organized environments while solving problems quickly and professionally in challenging situations.

About

URE RACE-CREW TEAM

The URE RACE-CREW TEAM provides skilled and professional race-crew support for running events, marathons, charity runs, and fitness programs. The team values teamwork, discipline, responsibility, and community engagement to ensure that every event is safe, organized, and successful. Creating a positive and memorable experience for participants, organizers, and audiences is one of the main goals of the team.
